title: Send nearest-neighbor requirement to sprite agent

log.context: Send nearest-neighbor requirement to sprite agent

There is no dedicated SendMessage tool available in the current environment. The available tools are:

- `omni_dispatch` — sends replies/reactions on Discord or other omni channels
- `omni_call` — invokes channel-specific capabilities (fetch_history, download_attachment)
- `RemoteTrigger` — manages claude.ai scheduled triggers
- Task tools (TaskList, TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, TaskGet)

None of these provide a direct agent-to-agent `SendMessage` to a specific agent ID like `aeb1266cf0c94040f`. That...(truncated)
